header.title: Keyword Density Checker — Analyze Keyword Frequency & Density
header.description: Free online keyword density checker to analyze keyword frequency and density in your content. Detect keyword stuffing, identify over-used and under-used terms, and check 2-word and 3-word phrase density. All processing happens client-side — your content stays private. Essential for on-page SEO optimization.
header.keywords: keyword density checker, keyword frequency analyzer, seo keyword analysis, keyword stuffing detector, phrase density checker, on-page seo tool

examples.title: Try an Example
examples.sampleText: Keyword density is important for SEO. Understanding keyword density helps content writers create better SEO content. The right keyword density improves search rankings and keyword visibility.
examples.result: Keyword "keyword" appears 3 times (10%) — consider reducing to 1-2.5% ideal range

items.question: What is keyword density?
items.answer: Keyword density is the percentage of times a keyword or phrase appears in your content relative to the total word count. It helps gauge keyword relevance.

items.question: What is the ideal keyword density?
items.answer: There is no fixed ideal density, but a natural 1-3% range is generally recommended. Avoid keyword stuffing as it can lead to search engine penalties.

items.question: Does keyword density affect rankings?
items.answer: While keyword density is not a direct ranking factor, using keywords naturally in your content helps search engines understand relevance and improves SEO.

items.question: What is keyword stuffing?
items.answer: Keyword stuffing is the practice of excessively using keywords in content to manipulate rankings. It creates a poor user experience and can result in search engine penalties.
